analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with HTML, CSS, and JS files. The event.json specifies a black holes theme with bulk animated objects, slides, and animated pages. The existing to-dos indicate incomplete CSS theming, HTML structure, and JS functionality. The current files lack the requested black holes theme with animations.

improvements.description: Create a comprehensive dark cosmic theme with black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and cosmic color palette. Include CSS animations for gravitational effects, event horizons, and animated slides.

Build complete HTML structure with black holes content, animated slides section, interactive cosmic elements, and mobile-friendly navigation with hamburger menu. Include sections about black holes, event horizons, and cosmic phenomena.

Implement JavaScript for animated slide functionality, cosmic object animations, mobile menu toggle with smooth transitions, and interactive black hole effects. Fix syntax errors and add proper event handlers for all UI elements.
